resources.string: This operation is not allowed in the current state
Enter your email and we\'ll send you a reset link.
If an account exists for this email, you\'ll receive a reset link shortly.
Review, change, or cancel your Skeinly Pro subscription in the platform store.
Email the Skeinly team for account questions, refund requests, DMCA notices, or other support.
Verification email sent to your new address. Click the link to confirm the change.

Anonymous app version, OS, device model, screen names, and tapped action names. Never your patterns, projects, notes, photos, email, or display name. Toggle off any time; turning it off clears the bug-report event trail immediately.
Beta builds can send anonymous diagnostic data to help us track down bugs. Default is off — you choose. You can change this any time in Settings.
Opens a pre-filled GitHub Issue in your browser. The bug report includes the last 10 actions you took (no PII).
Steps to reproduce, what you expected, what happened…
Submitting sends this report to the Skeinly team. The report includes your description plus app version, OS, device, locale, and your last 10 actions — no patterns, notes, photos, or PII.
Couldn\'t send — check your network connection and try again.
You\'ve sent too many reports recently. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Your report couldn\'t be sent because of an invalid field. Try editing your description and submitting again.
Bug reporting isn\'t available right now. Please try again later.
The server couldn\'t process your report. Please try again in a few minutes.
Something went wrong while sending your report. Please try again.
Please confirm your email address first
Too many attempts. Please try again later
An account with this email already exists
No account found with this email
You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
Start tracking your first knitting project
Try adjusting your search or filters
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
Keep all your knitting projects organized in one place with row counting and progress tracking.
Never lose your place again. Tap to count rows, add notes, and attach progress photos.
Save your favorite patterns with gauge, yarn info, and needle sizes for easy reference.
Already have an account? Sign In
Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
An account with %1$s already exists. Sign in with your password, then link Apple from Settings.
%1$s is already used by an existing Skeinly account. Enter your password to link your account.
We sent a confirmation link to %1$s. Click the link to complete sign-in.
If you don\'t see it within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
If the email still doesn\'t arrive, you may already have an account. Try signing in instead.
Deleting your account will permanently remove all your projects, progress, and shared content. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Try adjusting your search or filters
Public patterns from other knitters will appear here
Build your pattern library with gauge, yarn, and needle info
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to remove this reference image?
Are you sure you want to delete this note?
Share this link with others to give them view access to your project.
Copy saved (chart copy failed — try saving again from project detail)
View only \u2014 saving a copy is not permitted for this share
Save a copy to my projects
Projects shared with you will appear here
%1$s saved a copy of a pattern
Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
This clears every stitch marked on this project. Your row-counter notes and photos are kept. This cannot be undone.
Tap a stitch to set the reflection axis.

plurals.name: dialog_delete_layer_body
plurals.item: This layer has %1$d cell. Deleting it can be recovered with Undo from the toolbar.
This layer has %1$d cells. Deleting it can be recovered with Undo from the toolbar.

resources.string: Saved chart versions will appear here
This adds a new version on top of the current version with the contents of this older version. Nothing in your history is overwritten.
Suggestions from copies and to original patterns will appear here
The contributor\'s changes will land on your variation as a new version. Conflict resolution ships in Phase 38.4.
Closing keeps the comment history but the changes will not land on the original chart. The author can send a new suggestion later.
Optional notes for the pattern owner…
Skeinly Pro gives you access to premium content and helps support independent development.
• Download premium symbol packs (advanced stitches + future content additions)\n• Future Pro-only features as they ship\n• Help fund continued development of Skeinly
7-day free trial. Auto-renews until canceled. Manage or cancel anytime from Settings > Manage Subscription.
Subscriptions are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Tap Refresh to fetch the catalog.
This pack is part of Skeinly Pro. Subscribe to unlock all symbols.
Get notified when collaborators send suggestions, comment on yours, or apply your changes.
Get notified when collaborators send suggestions, comment on yours, or apply your changes. You can change this anytime in Settings.
You denied notifications. Open Settings to re-enable.
A new version of Skeinly is required to continue. Please update from the store to keep using the app.
We are performing scheduled maintenance on the Skeinly backend. Please try again in a few minutes.
Open Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app and scan the QR code below. If you can\'t scan, enter the secret manually.
Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator to confirm pairing.
Write this code down or take a screenshot. If you lose your authenticator device, this single-use code is the only way to recover access. We will never show it again.
Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
Too many failed attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
Your account will no longer require a second factor at sign-in. You can re-enable it anytime.
Confirm it\'s you to re-enter Skeinly
Confirm it\'s you to delete your account
Confirm it\'s you to disable two-factor authentication
No biometric or PIN enrolled in OS settings
When enabled, Skeinly asks for biometric (or device PIN) after you\'ve been away for the selected time. Sensitive actions like deleting your account always ask, even when this is off.
Welcome! We pre-filled your name from your sign-in. Edit it or use it as-is.
Use this picture as your avatar?
You can change your picture anytime in Settings → Profile.
Reset your patterns, projects, and comments. Keeps your account and Pro membership.
Sign-in, display name, avatar, Pro membership, push notification preferences (re-registered automatically)
Patterns, projects, charts, comments, suggestions, shared links, activity history, downloaded symbol packs
Your data has been deleted. Your account is still active.
No friends yet. Invite someone to get started.
Tap below to create an invite.
Share this code or link with your knitting friends. Codes expire in 14 days.
%1$s won\'t see your friends-only patterns anymore.
